manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are playing a collaborative word guessing game in which you have to describe a target word for another player to guess.

Rules:
(a) You have to reply in the form: CLUE: <some text>. Guesses from the other player will start with GUESS.
(b) You cannot use the target word itself, parts or morphological variants of it in your description.
(c) In addition, the same rules apply for related words which are provided below.

End conditions:
(i) If you use the target word or a related word in your description, then you lose.
(ii) If the other player can guess the target word in 3 tries, you both win.

Let us start.

This is the target word that you need to describe and that the other player needs to guess:

competent

Related words are:

- efficient
- skilled
- capable

Important: You are under time pressure, give short descriptions that are to the point!

content.thinking:
I need to describe "competent" without using:
- competent (or morphological variants like competence, competently)
- efficient
- skilled
- capable

I should think of synonyms or ways to describe this concept:
- able to do the job well
- qualified
- proficient
- adequate
- having the necessary abilities
- good at what they do

Let me give a short, direct clue:

"Able to perform a task properly and effectively"

Wait, I should avoid "able" as it might be too close to "capable". Let me try:
"Qualified and proficient at doing a job"

Or simpler:
"Having the necessary qualifications and ability to do something well"

Actually, let me go with something very direct and short:

content.text: CLUE: Qualified and able to do a job properly

clem_player.response: CLUE: Qualified and able to do a job properly

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are playing a collaborative word guessing game in which you have to guess a target word that another player describes to you.

You can make one guess at each trial. You win when you guess the target word. You lose when you cannot guess it in 3 tries.

After each trial you will get a new hint from the other player which starts with CLUE.

Make your guesses by just saying the word using the following form: GUESS: <a word>

Let us start.


CLUE: Qualified and able to do a job properly

content.thinking:
The clue is "Qualified and able to do a job properly". This describes someone who has the skills and qualifications to perform a task well.

Some words that come to mind:
- Competent
- Capable
- Skilled
- Proficient
- Qualified
- Able

The most common word that means "qualified and able to do a job properly" is "competent". This seems like the most likely answer.
